chunks.title: Trust in God's Protection
chunks.reason: A declaration of faith and confidence in Yahweh as light and defense against enemies.

chunks.title: Prayer for Guidance and Deliverance
chunks.reason: A petition asking God to hear the voice, hide His face no more, and lead the psalmist.

chunks.title: Call to Hope and Courage
chunks.reason: A concluding reflection on faith in God's goodness followed by an encouragement to hope.
